# Branch Protection Checklist

Apply these controls on the default branch before publication-grade releases:

1. Require pull request before merge.
2. Require at least one approving review.
3. Dismiss stale approvals after new commits.
4. Require status checks to pass before merging.
5. Require branch up to date before merge.
6. Block force pushes.
7. Block branch deletion.
8. Enable secret scanning and push protection.
9. Enable code scanning alerts visibility.
10. Restrict who can push directly to default branch.

This checklist is operational guidance for GitHub repository settings.
